title: The Devil with the Three Golden Hairs
lines: A poor child was born under a lucky star, and a soothsayer declared he would marry the king's daughter.
The king, hearing this, had the child placed in a box and thrown into the river.
But the child was rescued by a miller and his wife, who raised him as their own.
Years later, the king recognized the boy and hired him as a servant.
The king, still wanting to prevent the prophecy, sent the boy to the devil's grandmother to fetch three golden hairs from the devil's head.
The boy journeyed far and wide and came to the devil's house.
The devil's grandmother took pity on him and plucked the three golden hairs from the devil's head while he slept.
Each hair, she explained, was the answer to one of the king's questions.
The boy returned and answered the king's questions so cleverly that the king was forced to keep his word and allow the boy to marry his daughter.
The prophecy was fulfilled, and they lived happily together.
